_file_comment: Chronicles of Darkness — Mortals+ data file.
This file has three sections: CONFIGURATION, then CONTENT.
CONFIGURATION keys drive the app structure and should be edited carefully.
CONTENT keys are lists of game entries freely added, removed, or replaced.
Use the in-app Data Library import/export to share or update content safely.
_skills_comment: skill_definitions: ordered list of all skills available on the sheet.
key:      internal identifier used in saved characters (do not change after use)
label:    display name shown on the sheet (can be changed freely)
The 'athletics' key is referenced in the Defense formula.
Renaming its label is safe; changing its key will break Defense calculation.
To add a skill: append an entry. To remove: delete the entry.
Skills are shown in the order listed here.

skill_definitions.label: Athletics
skill_definitions._note: athletics key is used in the Defense formula — renaming the label is safe, but do not change the key

_sections_comment: section_definitions: ordered registry of every toggleable sheet section.
Each entry: { key, label, group, zone, order, type, default, [state_key], [max_rating], [max], [beats_key], [xp_key] }
key:        unique identifier for this section (used in sectionConfig)
label:      display name shown in the Sheet Configuration panel and on the PDF
group:      config panel group header: Mortal | Hunter | (future splats)
zone:       where on the sheet this section appears:
header            — character header row
beats             — beats/XP tracker row (between header and full-width-top)
full-width-top    — full-width area below beats, above the two columns
left-column       — left column (skills area)
right-column      — right column (traits/conditions area)
full-width-bottom — full-width area below the two columns
order:      sort order within the zone (lower = higher on sheet)
type:       rendering type — see list below
default:    true = visible by default, false = hidden by default
state_key:  STATE field this section reads/writes (defaults to key if omitted)
max_rating: for rated-list — maximum dot rating (default 5)
max:        for dot-track — number of dots (default 10)
beats_key:  for beats-xp — STATE key for the beats counter (default: 'beats')
xp_key:     for beats-xp — STATE key for the experience counter (default: 'experience')
Section types:
attributes      — the 9 core attributes (special renderer)
skills          — the 27 skills with rote/specialty (special renderer)
derived-traits  — health, willpower, defense, initiative, speed (special renderer)
dot-track       — a simple 1–N dot track (e.g. Integrity, Humanity)
header-fields   — text fields in the character header
beats-xp        — a beats counter + XP counter pair (zone: beats)
line-list       — a simple list of text lines (e.g. Aspirations, Touchstones)
named-list      — collapsible cards with name + description (e.g. Tilts, Tactics)
rated-list      — collapsible cards with name + rating + description (e.g. Merits, Endowments)
resource-track  — 20 manually-toggled squares in 2 rows of 10 (Mana, Essence, Vitae)
arcana-block    — fixed rated list from the section's fields array (Mage Arcana)
renown-block    — five named 5-dot tracks in a single block (Werewolf Renown)
forms-block     — live reference table showing per-form calculated stats
weapons         — weapon cards with full weapon fields (special renderer)
armor           — armor cards with full armor fields (special renderer)
equipment       — equipment cards with full equipment fields (special renderer)
textarea        — a multi-line text area (e.g. Notes, The Code)
dot-square-track — dot row (max rating) above square row (current value), like Willpower but data-driven (e.g. Clarity)
_presets_comment: Applying a preset does a full reset — all sections are set to the values listed.
Every section key must be present in each preset.
To add a preset: add an entry with a name and a config covering all section keys.
The 'Mortal' preset represents the default starting configuration.
_names_comment: mortal_names: names used by the Generate Baseline button.
Add or remove names freely. Order does not matter.
_lists_comment: The following lists are the content database for sheet dropdowns.
All lists are sorted alphabetically when loaded.
Use the in-app Data Library import/export to share or update these safely.
weapons:    { name, weapon_type, damage, initiative_mod, strength_req, size, availability, notes }
ranged weapons also need: ranges, clip
armor:      { name, armor_general, armor_ballistic, defense_penalty, speed_penalty, strength_req, availability, notes }
equipment:  { name, dice_bonus, durability, size, structure, availability, desc }

merits.name: Area of Expertise
merits.desc: Requires 2 Resolve and 1 Skill Specialty. Choose a Specialty to assign to this Merit. Forgo the +1 bonus afforded by a Specialty, in exchange for a +2.

merits.name: Ambidextrous
merits.desc: Available only at character creation. Your character does not suffer the -2 penalty for using his off hand in combat or to perform other actions.

armor.name: Reinforced Clothing
armor.notes: This armor is concealed. Covers torso, arms, and legs.

equipment.name: Flashlight
equipment.desc: Die bonus subtracts from any penalties due to darkness, and adds to any rolls to search in the dark. Some can also be used as a club. Also can blind a subject. Roll Dexterity + Athletics, subtracting opponent's Defense. The victim’s player. If your character scores more successes than the subject, the subject is blinded for one turn. Victims with especially acute senses are blinded for two turns.

equipment.name: Smartphone
equipment.desc: Increases dice bonus to +2 if bought at Availability 3. A smartphone with camera, GPS, and internet access. Battery lasts approximately one day of moderate use.

tilts.name: Arm Wrack
tilts.desc: One of the character's arms is damaged and unusable. They cannot use two-handed weapons or take actions requiring both arms. Any action suffers a -2 offhand penalty if taken with the offhand. Ended when the injury is healed.

tilts.name: Beaten Down
tilts.desc: The player must spend a point of Willpower each time he wants the character to take a violent action. Ends when the character surrenders.

conditions.name: Blind
conditions.desc: Any rolls requiring sight may only use a chance die. If another sense can be reasonably substituted, make the roll at -3 instead.

conditions.name: Inspired
conditions.desc: When your character takes an action pertaining to that inspiration, you may resolve this Condition. Gain a Willpower point, and consider the roll an Exceptional Success on three successes, instead of five

_endowments_comment: endowments: Hunter endowments from compacts and conspiracies.

endowments.name: Benediction
endowments.desc: Each point of Benediction grants access to an additional Virtuous Ritual and adds a die to the ritual dice pool.

endowments.name: Castigation: Sense Weakness
endowments.desc: Spend 1 Willpower and roll Wits + Empathy vs Finesse. On a success, gain the Informed Condition about the subject. On a failure, learn nothing. On a dramatic failure, gain the Spooked Condition.

endowments.name: Elixir
endowments.desc: Each dot of Elixir provides access to one additional recipe and adds a die to the Elixir dice pool.

_werewolf_forms_comment: Each entry: { name, subtitle, attr_mods, size_mod, armor, perception_bonus, special_traits }
attr_mods: object of attribute keys to numeric modifiers (omit or set 0 for unchanged)
armor: flat armor value in this form
perception_bonus: flat bonus to Perception rolls
special_traits: array of strings listing form powers and notes
_rotes_comment: rotes: Mage rotes. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

rotes.name: Kinetic Blow
rotes.desc:
**Arcana**: Forces 2
**Primary Factor**: Potency
**Rote Skill**: Occult
Subject's unarmed attacks gain a damage bonus equal to Potency (to a maximum of 5) and deal lethal damage.
**+1 Reach**: spell applies the Knocked Down Tilt.
**+2 Reach**: spell applies the Stunned Tilt.
**+1 Reach**: spell affects held weapons.
**+2 reach**: spell affects thrown weapons or grants Armor Piercing equal to Potency to firearms.

rotes.name: Cleanse the Body
rotes.desc:
**Arcana**: Life 1
**Primary Factor**: Potency
**Rote Skill**: Medicine
Grants bonus equal to Potency to next roll to resist a toxin's effects.

rotes.name: Ward and Signs
rotes.desc:
**Arcana**: Prime 2
**Primary Factor**: Duration
**Rote Skill**: Intimidation
When the subject is the target of a spell, that spell is Withstood with the Potency of Wards and Signs.

_arcana_attainments_comment: arcana_attainments: Mage Arcana Attainments. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

arcana_attainments.name: Mage Armor - Forces
arcana_attainments.desc: Spend 1 Mana to activate. Applies the mage's full Forces rating as general armor, applicable against all damaging physical atacks, fire, and electricity. Has no effect on mental or psychic attacks.

arcana_attainments.name: Conditional Duration
arcana_attainments.desc:
Spend 1 Mana to add a Conditional Duration to a spell. Doing so adds factors to the spell's duration based on the nature of the condition.
Improbable: 1
Infrequent: 2
Common: 3

_legacy_attainments_comment: legacy_attainments: Mage Legacy Attainments. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

legacy_attainments.name: First Attainment
legacy_attainments.desc: The mage's first Legacy Attainment, unlocked upon joining the Legacy. Record the specific Attainment name and effect here.

legacy_attainments.name: Second Attainment
legacy_attainments.desc: The second Legacy Attainment, typically requiring Gnosis 3 or higher. Record the specific Attainment name and effect here.

_gifts_comment: gifts: Werewolf Gifts. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

gifts.name: Shadow Gaze
gifts.desc:
**Moon Gift**
**Cost**: 1 Essence
**Duration**: 1 Scene
**Dice Pool**: Wits + Occult + Wisdom vs Resistance
**Action**: Instant, may be Contested
Add Wisdom Renown to all Emphathy rolls made when interacting with spirits and the Ridden. Can also be used to directly to any spirit you can perceive, revealing symbolic truths. Second and subsequent uses cost 1 Essence each.
**Dramatic Failure**: Unable to read the spirit and the spirit becomes aware of the attempt.
**Failure**: Unable to read spirit.
**Success**: Learn the spirit's ban or bane.
**Exceptional Success**: Learn both the spirit's ban and bane.

gifts.name: Cold Embrace
gifts.desc:
**Gift of Death**
**Cost**: 1 Essence
**Duration**: 1 hour per success
**Dice Pool**: Stamina + Medicine + Cunning
**Action**: Instant
**Dramatic Failure**: Suffer 1 aggravated damage
**Failure**: Fail to still body's vital signs
**Succcess**: Still body's vital signs. Appear to be freshly dead, displaying no pulse or respiration, and ceasing natural regeneration. Can still act under this effect with a penalty of 5 - Cunning Renown, appearing as an undead creature.
**Exceptional Success**: Reduce all damage suffered by 1.

_rites_comment: rites: Werewolf Rites. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

rites.name: Chain Rage
rites.desc:
**Wolf Rite**
**Symbols**: Rage, calm, binding, dawn
**Sample Rite**: Certain northerly Scandinavian packs work themselves into a frothing fury udner the light of the new day's sun, scream their anger into etched jars and rend their own flesh until exhausted. Then they hurl themselves into frigid water. (Stamina + Survival).
**Action**: Extended (10 successes, each roll represents 1 minute
Duration: 1 month
**Success**: Ritual affects all Uratha who take part. It binds a container or focus to each participant, such as a bottle or piece of chain. As long as the Uratha keeps the focus about her person, then achieving five turns of lucidity during a period of Wasu-Im (not continuous) immediately ends the rage. At the end of the month, or should the focus be broken or taken, the Uratha immediately enters Wasu-Im.

_disciplines_comment: disciplines: Vampire Disciplines. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

disciplines.name: Celerity
disciplines.desc:
**Cost**: None or 1 Vitae per active effect
**Dice Pool**: None
**Action**: None (for persistant effects) or Reflexive (for active effects)
**Duration**: Permanant (for persistant effects) or one turn (for active effects)
**Persistant**: Add the vampire's dots in Celerity to her Defense or to her Dodge roll when defending actively. If a firearms attack denies her normal defense, the attacker still takes a penalty to his attack equal to the vampire's dots in Celerity. A character must still be aware of the incoming attacks and able to move to defend against them.
**Active**: By spending Vitae Celerity can enable one of the following effects (each can only be done once a turn but multiple can be done simultaneously:
- Move to the head of the Initiative queue
- Interrupt the action of another character with a brief action of her own (still limited to 1 instant action).
- Multiply her Speed by dots in Celerity+1

disciplines.name: Majesty: Confidant
disciplines.desc:
**Cost**: None
**Requirement**: The vampire must use Awe on the victim.
**Dice Pool**: Presence + Empathy + Majesty vs Resolve + Blood Potency
**Action**: Contested; resistance is reflective
**Dramatic Failure**: Gain the Swooning Condition for the victim.
**Failure**: No effect.
**Success**: Victim gains the Charmed Condition.
**Exceptional Success**: Victim's Charmed Condition lasts for nights rather than hours.

disciplines.name: Protean: Beast's Skin
disciplines.desc:
**Cost**: 2 Vitae
**Dice Pool**: None
Action: Instant
**Duration**: Infinite
Take the form of an animal the vampire has consumed. Can only take the form of predatory animals, carrion-eaters, plague-carrying beasts, and parasites between Size 1 and 7. A vampire can have a number of forms at the ready equal to her dots in Protean; to add or replace one she must consume the appropriate beast then slumber for a full day and night in her Unmarked Grave. In animal form she takes on the beast't Physical Attributes, Skills, Size, Speed, and Health. She can move, sense, and attack in any way the animal can. She may be unable to use some Physical Merits at the Storyteller's discretion. She can remain in her animal form indefinitely but still needs to consume blood and will be harmed by sunlight. The vampire can use her Disciplines in animal form.

_devotions_comment: devotions: Vampire Devotions and Coils. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

devotions.name: Body of Will
devotions.desc:
**Requirements**: Resiliance 3, Vigor 1
**Cost**: 1 Vitae
Dice Pool: Stamina + Survival + Resiliance
**Action**: Reflexive
For one turn per success, the character suffers no wound penalties. As well, during any turn where he takes damage, he does not need to spend Vitae to activate one effect of Vigor. This Devotion costs 2 Experiences to learn.

_vampire_rites_comment: vampire_rites: Vampire Rites and Miracles. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

vampire_rites.name: Rigor Mortis
vampire_rites.desc:
**Target number of successes**: 5
**Resisted**: Composure
The victim, who must be a vampire within a mile of the ritual, suffers the loss of the reanimating power of Vitae. His next physical action is penalized by -3.

_tactics_comment: tactics: Hunter tactics — coordinated cell manoeuvres.
desc: rules summary of what the tactic does and how to execute it

tactics.name: Identification
tactics.desc:
**Requirements**: Primary actor: Occult 2
**Action**: Instant and contested: each roll takes an hour, including the primary actor's.
**Dice Pools**:
 *Primary*: Intelligence + Occult vs Manipulation + Subterfuge + Potency.
  *Secondary*: Wits + Investigation (collecting evidence, 1/3, or 0/3 if someone tails the target); Wits + Stealth (tailing target 1/1, or 0/1 if someone collects evidence); Wits + Occult (resource, 0/3).
**Success**: The hunters discern whether the target is an ordinary human, a hunter, or a supernatural creature; if the latter, they learn the type of creature. They also learn one of the following about the target: one Anchor, one Aspiration, the location of their lair or home, or the identity of one character important to her. All participants gain the Informed Condition regarding the target.
**Exceptional Success**: As success, but players learn two specific pieces of information.
**Failure an Dramatic Failure**: The target becomes aware of the investigation and takes on group of secondary actors by surprise with an ambush, an automatically successful supernatural power, or a disadvantageous circumstance.

tactics.name: Called Shot
tactics.desc:
**Action**: Instant and resisted
**Dice Pools**:
  *Primary*: Strength + Weaponry or Dexterity + Firearms - target's Defense.
  *Secondary*: Manipulation + Persuasion or Subterfuge (baiting, 1/2); Strength + Brawl (tacking, 1/2)
**Success**: The opponent suffers the appropriate Tilt for a successful hit on the specified target, and the hunter's attack deals damage as normal with a +1 to his weapon modifier. The target takes a penalty to Initiative equal to the number of participants for the rest of the scene.
**Exceptional Success**: As success, and the Storyteller offers an immediate surrender in exchange for a non-lethal outcome to the scene. If the players accept, the Tactic’s tar- get submits to whatever fate the hunters choose that can be enacted within the current scene, such as capture or giving something up, as long as it doesn’t involve further violence against the target.
**Failure or Dramatic Failure**: The target twists or ducks at the last minute, and the primary actor makes a reflexive attack against the secondary actor closest to the target, ignoring Defense.

_contracts_comment: desc: include Cost, Dice pool, Action, Duration, Loophole, and Seeming Benefit where applicable

contracts.name: Cloak of Night (Common)
contracts.desc:
**Regalia:** Shield 
**Cost**: 1 Glamour
**Dice Pool**: None
**Action**: Instant
Effects: Must be invoked where vision roll penalties are applied. Affects a number of willing companions equal to dots in Dexterity. Stealth rolls gain a bonus of half the character's Wyrd rating and hide all affected characters as long as they don't draw attention to themselves.
**Darkling**: The Darkling and her companions retain the benefits of this Contract even if they attract attention to themselves.
**Ogre**: The Ogre may substitute Stamina for Dexterity for hiding companions.
**Loophole**: The changeling and her companions don black articles of clothing that mark them as sneaks and rogues.

contracts.name: Boon of the Scuttling Spider (Common)
contracts.desc:
**Cost**: 1 Glamour.
**Dice Pool**: None
**Action**: Instant.
**Effects**: Character can move along walls, ceilings, or slick surfaces at normal Speed.
**Beast**: May use the restrain in a grapple as though he had rolled an exceptional success.
**Darkling**: Gain a two-die bonus to stealth while scuttling across impossible surfaces.
**Loophole**: Changeling swallows a live spider.

_pledges_comment: desc: include type (Sealing/Oath/Bargain), parties, boons, sanctions, and duration
_praxes_comment: praxes: Mage Praxes — spells the Mage has mastered. Each entry: { name, desc }
_demonic_form_comment: demonic_form: a demon's Demonic Form manifestations. Each entry: { name, desc }

demonic_form.name: Armored Plates
demonic_form.desc:
**Modification**
**System**: Armor provides full coverage with a 3/2 rating and a -1 Defense and Speed penalty.

demonic_form.name: Environmental Resistance
demonic_form.desc:
**Technology**
**System**: The demon is immune to the adverse effects from all Environmental Tilts.

demonic_form.name: Wings
demonic_form.desc:
**Propulsion**
**System**: The demon is capable of flight and has a species factor of 10 to his Speed while flying.

_embeds_comment: embeds: a demon's known Embeds. Each entry: { name, desc }

embeds.name: Alibi
embeds.desc:
**Mundane**
**Dice Pool**: Manipulation + Stealth
**Action**: Instant
**Dramatic Failure**: The demon's Cover appears but not anywhere useful for an alibi. The demon has no idea where it appeared or what the consequences will be.
**Failure**: No effect. Cannot be used again for the target scene.
**Success**: The demon separates himself from his Cover for a scene. The cover is able to make small talk but not make dice rolls or take significant action. If the cover dies, the demon drops to Cover 0 unless he has another Cover to shift to or pact to call in. During this scene the demon can take any actions he wishes without fear his deeds will be traced back to his cover. As such, during that scene the demon cannot be compromised by taking actions antithetical to that Cover. Exploits and demonic form powers still compromise normally.
**Exceptional Success**: As above, but the cover possesses more self-awareness. If threatened, it leaves the area and vanishes when out of sight.

embeds.name: Common Misconception
embeds.desc:
**Vocal**
**Dice Pool**: Manipulation + Science
**Action**: Reflexive
**Dramatic Failure**: The information that the demon produces strengthens the target's argument. Add the demon's Primum to the target's Skill roll. The demon gains the Discredited Condition (-3 on all attempts to convince any witnesses to this exchange of anything for the rest of the scene). The demon can resolve this Condition by succeeding on a roll using the same Skill that the target was using, but achieving more successes than the target did.
**Failure**: No effect; the target's roll is unaffected.
**Success**: The "fact" that the demon produces undermines the target's ability. Apply a penalty equal to the Embed successes or the demon's Primum (whichever is higher) to the target's Skill roll.
**Exceptional Success**: The target fails the Skill roll outright and loses a point of Willpower.

embeds.name: Ambush
embeds.desc:
**Instrumental**
**Dice Pool**: Wits + Stealth
**Action**: Instant
**Dramatic Failure**: The demon prepares for the ambush, but has missed some critical detail. When the target arrives, the demon is surprised and any allies that were planning to benefit from this Embed must roll to see if they are surprised.
**Failure**: No effect. The demon and her allies must roll for initiative normally.
**Success**: The demon positions herself (and, if she wishes, allies up to her Primum rating) such that when their enemy enters the area, the enemy is automatically surprised. The enemy cannot act during the first turn of combat.
**Exceptional Success**: As above, except the demon can cover as many allies as she wishes with this Embed's effects.

_exploits_comment: exploits: a demon's known Exploits. Each entry: { name, desc }

exploits.name: Affliction
exploits.desc:
**Example Prerequisites**: Deafen, Recurring Hallucinations
**Dice Pool**: Strength + Medicine + Primum vs Stamina or Resolve + Supernatural Tolerance.
**Action**: Instant
**Cost**: 1 Aether
**Dramatic Failure**: The demon suffers the effects of the Affliction herself. Any Condition or Tilt thus gained remain until the demon assumes demonic form.
**Failure**: The target is not afflicted.
**Success**: The demon curses the target, and may impose one Condition or Tilt. Appropriate choices include Madness, Poisoned, Sick, Shunned, and Mute. The demon can also specify and outward sign of Affliction - a disfigurement, an alteration to the target's voice or smell, or any other effect that marks the character.
The Affliction remains until the demon removes it. It can generate Beats for the character, but its usual resolution does not apply. The Affliciton can be removed through magical or supernatural means, at the Storyteller's discretion.
**Exceptional Success**: The demon may add more Conditions or Tilts at a cost of one Aether and one Willpower point each.

exploits.name: Hellfire
exploits.desc:
**Example Prerequisites**: Check Backdrop, Merciless Gunman
**Dice Pool**: Presence + Firearms + Primum
**Action**: Reflexive
**Cost**: 1 Aether
**Dramatic Failure**: The gun explodes, inflicting aggravated damage to the demon (and the gun's wielder, if applicable) equal to the demon's Primum.
**Failure**: The Exploit does not work and the gun is unaffected.
**Success**: The gun inflicts aggravated damage for the remainder of the scene. It's other capabilities are unaffected.
**Exceptional Success**: As above, but the player adds the demon's Primum to the weapon's damage rating.

variations.name: Carapace
variations.desc:
**Universal**
Has several potential effects based on Magnitude. See p115 of the Deviant core rulebook.

variations.name: Blessing
variations.desc:
**Coactive**
Has several potential effects based on Magnitufe. See p141 of the Deviant core rulebook.

scars.name: Conspicuous
scars.desc:
**Controlled**
See p152 of the Deviant core rulebook for effects.

scars.name: Power Build-Up
scars.desc:
**Involuntary**
See p157 of the Deviant core rulebook for effects.
